title: NOTICE237 ARCHIVED - Implementation of the Nisga'a First Nations Goods and Services Tax (FNGST) - Canada.ca
content:
## NOTICE237 ARCHIVED - Implementation of the Nisga'a First Nations Goods and Services Tax (FNGST)

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
The Nisga'a Lisims Government Executive has entered into an agreement with the Government of Canada allowing it to impose a value-added tax under the Nisga'a Goods and Services Tax Act.

## Ways to access the information
- Read the publication Online format notice237-e.html

### Read the publication
- Online format notice237-e.html
